patch.value: CONTEXT: inline embedding on mutation blocked the CLI ~1.6-2.4s. DECISION: mutations enqueue mutated IDs to search/pending-refresh.json under a mkdir gate lock and spawn a detached child that acquires the shared reindex lock, drains, embeds, upserts, and re-dispatches; failures re-enqueue; spawn errors are ignored so mutations never fail. CONSEQUENCES: instant mutations (create 2581->239ms); transient vector staleness surfaced as a query-time warning; self-healing via stale-lock timeout. EVIDENCE: src/core/search/background-refresh.ts, src/cli/search-refresh.ts; item pm-3ju0.
ADR: Non-blocking background semantic refresh (detached worker + reindex lock)
Non-blocking background semantic refresh (detached worker + reindex lock)
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Non-blocking background semantic refresh (detached worker + reindex lock)' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
